message:
feat: Add topk utility and TriageContext for performance optimization

Implements two key optimization foundations:

1. pkg/util/topk: Generic heap-based top-K collector
   - O(n log k) vs O(n log n) for selecting top elements
   - ~15x faster than sort.Slice for n=10000, k=100
   - Deterministic tie-breaking via optional less function
   - Comprehensive tests and benchmarks

2. pkg/analysis/triage_context.go: Unified caching for triage
   - Lazy-computed caches for ActionableIssues, BlockerDepth, etc.
   - Thread-safe version available (NewTriageContextThreadSafe)
   - Foundation for bv-oko3 and bv-vcdp optimizations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
